case_title: UNIVERSAL NORTH AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY VS. NENITA CATANGUI

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSAL NORTH AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CATANGUI, NENITA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $435.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE FEB-09-2024, FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIVERSAL NORTH AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNIVERSAL NORTH AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CATANGUI, NENITA $25,655.65 PRINCIPAL, $3,088.80 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $29,179.45, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
